
Index Fits {data-navmenu="Fits to Data"}
=====================================

Row
-------------------------------------

### Index Fits with Residuals

```{r idx_fits_resid}
# Single column: each fleet gets a fit panel + residual
# panel below it, all sharing the x-axis

idx <- mv$index_fits
fit_fleets <- unique(idx$fleet)
# Only show fleets with actual observations
fit_fleets <- fit_fleets[vapply(
  X = fit_fleets,
  FUN = function(fl) {
    any(!is.na(idx$obs[idx$fleet == fl]))
  },
  FUN.VALUE = logical(1)
)]

fc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = fit_fleets)
plot_list <- list()

for (fl in fit_fleets) {
  sub <- idx[idx$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
  obs_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$obs) & sub$obs > 0,
                 , drop = FALSE]

  # --- Fit panel ---
  p_fit <- plot_ly()

  # Predicted line (vulnerable biomass if available)
  if (!is.null(mv$vulnerable_biomass)) {
    vb <- mv$vulnerable_biomass[
      mv$vulnerable_biomass$fleet == fl,
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    if (nrow(vb) > 0) {
      p_fit <- add_lines(
        p = p_fit,
        x = vb$year, y = vb$est,
        line = list(color = "#cccccc", width = 1.5),
        name = "Vuln. biomass",
        showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = paste0(
          "VB %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
        )
      )
    }
  }

  # Predicted index (qB)
  pred_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$pred) & sub$pred > 0,
                  , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(pred_sub) > 0) {
    p_fit <- add_lines(
      p = p_fit,
      x = pred_sub$year, y = pred_sub$pred,
      line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2),
      name = "Predicted",
      showlegend = FALSE,
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        "Pred %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )
  }

  # Observed points
  if (nrow(obs_sub) > 0) {
    p_fit <- add_markers(
      p = p_fit,
      x = obs_sub$year, y = obs_sub$obs,
      marker = list(
        color = fc[fl], size = 6,
        line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
      ),
      name = "Observed",
      showlegend = FALSE,
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        "Obs %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )
  }

  lay_fit <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay_fit$annotations <- list(
    mv_top_label(label = fl)
  )
  lay_fit$yaxis$title <- "Index"
  p_fit <- do.call(
    what = layout,
    args = c(list(p = p_fit), lay_fit)
  )
  plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p_fit

  # --- Residual panel ---
  resid_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$residual), , drop = FALSE]
  p_resid <- plot_ly()
  if (nrow(resid_sub) > 0) {
    resid_col <- ifelse(
      test = resid_sub$residual >= 0,
      yes  = "#d62728", no = "#1f77b4"
    )
    p_resid <- add_bars(
      p = p_resid,
      x = resid_sub$year,
      y = resid_sub$residual,
      marker = list(color = resid_col),
      showlegend = FALSE,
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        "%{x}: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )
  }
  lay_resid <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay_resid$yaxis$title <- "Residual"
  lay_resid$shapes <- list(list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = min(years), x1 = max(years),
    y0 = 0, y1 = 0,
    line = list(color = "#666666", dash = "dash")
  ))
  p_resid <- do.call(
    what = layout,
    args = c(list(p = p_resid), lay_resid)
  )
  plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p_resid
}

# Stack: fit + resid pairs, each pair shares x
n_panels <- length(plot_list)
heights <- rep(c(0.7, 0.3), length.out = n_panels)
heights <- heights / sum(heights)

p_out <- subplot(
  plot_list,
  nrows = n_panels,
  shareX = TRUE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  titleY = TRUE,
  heights = heights,
  margin = 0.02
)
p_out <- layout(
  p = p_out,
  xaxis = list(title = "Year")
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
```
